extortion.description: The ASST Rhodense, belonging to the ATS of the Metropolitan City of Milan, encompasses the territory and healthcare and social-health facilities of the former ASL Districts of Rho, Garbagnate, and Corsico, as well as the hospital facilities of the former "Guido Salvini" Hospital.
